# Cross-machine benchmark aggregate

Machines with data: **4**.

**Clock policy:** CPU boost was disabled and clocks were held at base frequency for every controllable x86 host (all Windows and Linux runs). Apple Silicon exposes no boost-lock control, so the Apple M4 Pro (macOS) run used stock clock management; this exception is reported explicitly rather than being described as boost-disabled.

## Machines

| Label | CPU | OS | Compiler | Git commit | Dirty | Matrix | Scaling |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|:-:|:-:|

| AMD Ryzen 9 5900HX (Linux) | AMD Ryzen 9 5900HX with Radeon Graphics | Linux-6.17.0-14-generic-x86_64-with-glibc2.39 | /usr/bin/c++ | `486d2fa894` | False | ✓ | ✓ |
| AMD Ryzen 7 7730U (Windows) | AMD Ryzen 7 7730U with Radeon Graphics | Windows-11-10.0.26200-SP0 | C:/Program Files/LLVM/bin/clang++.exe | `4ee60763d4` | False | ✓ | ✓ |
| AMD Ryzen Threadripper PRO 3945WX 12-Cores (Windows) | AMD Ryzen Threadripper PRO 3945WX 12-Cores | Windows-11-10.0.26200-SP0 | C:/Qt/Tools/llvm-mingw1706_64/bin/clang++.exe | `486d2fa894` | False | ✓ | ✓ |

## Throughput matrix — cross-machine speedup (babo / liqui)

Peak-of-N throughput ratio per (scenario, NEW-order count). Absolute rates are not comparable across machines; the speedup is.

### Speedup summary (geomean across counts)

| Scenario | AMD Ryzen 7 7730U (Windows) | AMD Ryzen 9 5900HX (Linux) | AMD Ryzen Threadripper PRO 3945WX 12-Cores (Windows) | Apple M4 Pro (macOS) |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Normal | 4.65× | 2.46× | 2.38× | 2.09× |
| Swing-25 | 4.44× | 2.20× | 2.28× | 2.03× |
| Swing-40 | 4.51× | 2.17× | 2.29× | 2.06× |
| Flash-crash-60 | 4.44× | 2.08× | 2.22× | 1.97× |

## Scaling curve — cancel latency vs resting-book size

Speedup (liqui ns ÷ babo ns) per resting-book size N. babo is O(1) (flat); liquibook is O(depth) (climbs). The gap widens with N — the mechanism, not a single machine's constant.

### Cancel speedup by N

| Resting N | AMD Ryzen 7 7730U (Windows) | AMD Ryzen 9 5900HX (Linux) | AMD Ryzen Threadripper PRO 3945WX 12-Cores (Windows) | Apple M4 Pro (macOS) |
|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1,000 | 4.5× | 4.7× | 4.8× | 2.3× |
| 2,000 | 4.7× | 5.4× | 4.9× | 3.3× |
| 5,000 | 5.9× | 7.8× | 5.0× | 4.8× |
| 10,000 | 9.1× | 11.8× | 6.8× | 9.4× |
| 20,000 | 18.7× | 19.9× | 12.9× | 17.3× |
| 50,000 | 43.1× | 44.6× | 40.6× | 55.1× |
| 100,000 | 59.7× | 85.1× | 59.6× | 109.2× |
| 200,000 | 158.6× | 145.5× | 74.1× | 123.3× |
